misc.title: #ONEPIECE1180 To defend Sanji, Zoro, and everyone else, it was clear they didn't stand a chance; the combo team of Xebec, Roger, Garp, Whitebeard, Big Mom, and Kaido couldn't even do anything. What I
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1180 To defend Sanji, Zoro, and everyone else, it was clear they didn't stand a chance; the combo team of Xebec, Roger, Garp, Whitebeard, Big Mom, and Kaido couldn't even do anything. What I find more puzzling is why Imu is blocking the hits.

items.text: #ONEPIECE1180 To defend Sanji, Zoro, and everyone else, it was clear they didn't stand a chance; the combo team of Xebec, Roger, Garp, Whitebeard, Big Mom, and Kaido couldn't even do anything. What I find more puzzling is why Imu is blocking the hits.
